notes: Authoritative source is the official Crestron docs spec page. HDMI version is not explicitly stated in the spec sheet, but 4K60 4:4:4 support confirms HDMI 2.0 capability — grade inferred. SFP transceiver (SFP-1G Series) is sold separately. Audio I/O euroblock is configurable as input or output, not both simultaneously. The device can be powered via either the DC barrel connector or PoE+ on Ethernet 1. Unit is 1/2 rack width but mounts 1RU.

ports.name: HDMI Input
ports.note: HDMI Type A female; supports 4K60 4:4:4, HDR10, HDR10+, Dolby Vision, Deep Color; HDMI version not explicitly stated but 4K60 4:4:4 confirms HDMI 2.0 capability

ports.name: HDMI Output
ports.note: HDMI Type A female; built-in 4K60 4:4:4 scaler with motion-adaptive deinterlacing; DVI compatible; HDMI version not explicitly stated but 4K60 4:4:4 confirms HDMI 2.0 capability

ports.name: Ethernet 1
ports.note: 8-pin RJ-45 female; 100BASE-TX/1000BASE-T; PoE+ PD port (IEEE 802.3at Type 2 Class 4, 25.5 W)

ports.name: Ethernet 3
ports.note: 8-pin RJ-45 female; 100BASE-TX only; dedicated audio network or convenience port

ports.name: Ethernet 4
ports.note: SFP port; accepts Crestron SFP-1G Series transceiver module (sold separately); fiber-optic connectivity

ports.name: USB Device
ports.note: USB Type-C female; USB 2.0 device port; connection to host computers for signal extension

ports.name: USB Host
ports.note: USB Type-A female; USB 2.0 host port; for mice, keyboards, peripherals; 500 mA at 5 VDC

ports.name: USB HID
ports.note: USB Type-A female; USB 2.0 host port; hot key functionality; 500 mA at 5 VDC

ports.name: Audio I/O
ports.note: 5-pin 3.5 mm detachable terminal block; balanced/unbalanced stereo line-level; configurable as input OR output (not both simultaneously)

ports.name: COM
ports.note: 5-pin 3.5 mm detachable terminal block; bidirectional RS-232 port; up to 115.2k baud

ports.name: IR 1-2
ports.note: 4-pin 3.5 mm detachable terminal block; two IR/serial ports; IR output to 1.1 MHz or serial TTL (0–5 V) to 19200 baud

ports.name: 24VDC
ports.note: 2.1 x 5.5 mm DC power connector; 24 VDC 1.25 A input; alternative power via PoE+ on Ethernet 1
